name: Scarlet Devil Mansion Heist
description:
Do you have what it takes to rob the Scarlet Devil Mansion of its most sacred treasure? Based on the Touhou Project series sixth entry, Embodiment of Scarlet Devil.

Starring:

Marisa Kirisame as Big Boss

Hong Meiling as the Gatekeeper

Patchouli Knowledge as the Librarian

Koakoma as the Little Devil

Sakuya Izayoi as the Head Maid

Remilia Scarlet as the Scarlet Devil

Flandre Scarlet as the Little Sister


Update: since this bot has continued to get a lot of attention I've decided to put more lore into the story and details behind why you're robbing them in the first place, so stay tuned for further updates.

UPDATE LOG:
